Off Calendar Mar-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant U.C.S.F. Medical Center's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents
Granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $360 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf'S Deposition
Off Calendar Mar-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant U.C.S.F. Medical Center's motion to compel the attendance of plaintiff at deposition is Granted.
No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to contact defendant within 7 days of notice of this order to schedule the deposition at a mutually convenient time. The deposition shall be completed within 30 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $360 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
